items.name: The-benefit-of-the-base-network
items.description: Low Transaction Fees on the Base Network: Because it combines transactions using "rollup" technology and transmits them to Ethereum, gas fees are approximately 10 times cheaper than on the Ethereum mainnet.

items.name: cripto-about
items.description: Cryptocurrency is a digital or virtual currency that uses cryptography for security. Its most defining characteristic is that it is decentralized, meaning it isn't issued by any central authority like a bank or government. Transactions are typically recorded on a distributed ledger technology called blockchain
